    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    F

    findAlmostMills(ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Identifies all "almost mill" positions for the given player.
    findGuiBoardIn(Container) - Methode in Klasse view.GUI
     
    findMill(List<Node[]>, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Searches through a list of player moves to identify a mill formation for the specified player.
    findZwickMill(List<Node[]>, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Identifies a potential "Zwick Mill" move for the specified player.
    fromMoveData(MoveData, PlayerEntity, PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse persistance.GamePersistenceManager
    Reconstructs a Move from its saved MoveData.
    fromNode - Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    fromNodeId - Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    fromPhaseData(String, PlayerEntity) - Methode in Klasse persistance.GamePersistenceManager
     
    fromPlayerData(PlayerData, PlayerEntity, boolean) - Methode in Klasse persistance.GamePersistenceManager
    Reconstructs a PlayerEntity from its saved PlayerData.
    fromStrategyClass(Class<?>) - Statische Methode in Enum-Klasse difficulties.DifficultyLevel
    Maps a given strategy class to its corresponding difficulty level.
